_comment: Backlog fixture for the Epic 4 restart-recovery drill (orion-e4a). The Conductor consumes this 2-issue backlog, spawns a worker for issue-1, the operator kills the leader Conductor mid-run, and the standby leader resumes without double-spawning. See test/acceptance/expected_restart_drill_shape.json for the pinned invariants.

issues.title: Wrap http.Get with retry/backoff in FetchUpstream
